_comment: Authored posting TEMPLATES — the seed bank. Runtime postings are sim state (Board), not this file. reach:"posting" = board + adventurer + site; reach:"errand" = in-town neighbour, site null. site ids resolve at PNO.M2 (sites.json); shape-validated, not existence-checked, at M1. lines use {requester} only — the renderer resolves a bare role to a townee name and passes every other token through verbatim.

lines.hearsay: There's paper up for a herb-picking job somewhere out in the wet.
lines.gossip: {requester} has a posting up — sedgewort, and not a little of it.
lines.report: {requester} filed for sedgewort from the Sedge Fen; 0.25 on delivery, expires in 4d.

lines.hearsay: Something heavy wants hauling out of the old workings, and it pays.
lines.gossip: {requester} put pig iron on the board and priced it high enough that nobody had to ask why.
lines.report: {requester} filed for pig iron from the Cinder Drift; 0.4 on delivery, expires in 6d.

lines.hearsay: There's slate wanted off the high ground, and the pay is what it is.
lines.gossip: {requester} wants slate for the Rents' roof, and the paper says 'reasonable terms' in a hand that dares you to argue.
lines.report: {requester} filed for roof slate from the Slate Scarp; 0.15 on delivery, expires in 7d.

lines.hearsay: Somebody at the market needs a sack carried, and won't carry it themselves.
lines.gossip: {requester} is paying a neighbour to walk to the mill so she doesn't have to, and everyone knows exactly why.
lines.report: {requester} filed an errand for flour from the mill; 0.05 on delivery, expires in 1d.
